Action: # Language Translation: Change language application Form
Make sure you logged in to the application
Click the dropdown which shows `English`, `Français`. the dropdown box is located on the right side above the `Application Progress` menu
Select `Français` if you are in English language or `English` if you are in French language.

Expected Test Results: The text on the application form changes as per the selection. If you select `Français`, the text should change to French language

Action: ## Change language when NOT logged in
Make sure you are logged out of the application

Expected Test Results: You will be redirected to login page

Action: Click the dropdown which shows `English`, `Français`. the dropdown box is located on the right side above the `Application Progress` menu
Select `Français` if you are in English language.

Expected Test Results: The text on the application form changes to French language
You are logged in and redirected to Application Form
The text on the application form is in French language
